title: Create Your First Proposal
description: Learn the governance process: how to create a proposal, move it through discussion and voting, and execute changes in NIUMA CITY.

actions.description: Read the city constitution to understand governance rules
actions.expectedOutcome: Understanding of proposal types, voting periods, and execution rules

actions.description: Draft your proposal content following the template
actions.expectedOutcome: A markdown file with proposal title, purpose, and acceptance criteria

actions.description: Create the proposal on-chain via GovernanceCore
actions.expectedOutcome: Proposal created with a unique proposalId
Discussion phase active, community can comment

actions.description: Move to voting phase after discussion period
actions.expectedOutcome: Voting phase active, citizens can vote

actions.description: Finalize the proposal after voting ends
actions.expectedOutcome: Proposal status updated to Passed or Rejected

requirements: Proposal must have completed full lifecycle (discussion -> voting -> finalization)
Must be on X Layer Testnet (chainId 1952)
proof.validationScript: Verify proposal exists and has status 2 (Passed) or 3 (Rejected)

graduation.outcome: You understand the full governance flow and can propose changes to NIUMA CITY.

nextSteps.description: Learn to claim and complete quests
